name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
Is YSL now pursuing a dual approach? Not only have they launched a super huge tote bag, but also a cute mini round bag to meet the needs of different people! The new SADE mini round tube handbag may be small, but it is not a useless little bag. Tested to easily hold a mobile phone and daily small items. Stylish and practical! The entire bag features a diamond quilting pattern paired with the classic YSL mini logo. It is incredibly exquisite! Made of original lambskin leather with a soft and comfortable texture, paired with a short shoulder strap, it is cute beyond imagination! Model: 699703 Size: 20x10x10cm
